At Lumos Capital, you're more than just an investor you're part of our Family

In this family we assist you in realizing your fullest potential without any concerns about funding your desired lifestyle

Latest Research

Research Round-Up: April 2023

Why Choose Lumos?

we've designed a revolutionary approach to asset management that prioritizes your family's financial peace of mind. Our proactive strategy allows us to effectively navigate the stock and crypto markets on your behalf, generating profits that are more than sufficient to cover your subsequent monthly expenses for as long as you remain part of our family.

We understand that every household and family has distinct financial aspirations and responsibilities. That's why our team of dedicated experts takes the time to understand your specific financial goals, and future objectives. Through personalized strategies and tailor-made solutions, we strive to optimize your returns and ensure your family's financial security.

Our commitment to your success extends beyond helping you cover your monthly expenses. We are devoted to fostering a transparent and open relationship with you, providing regular updates, educational resources, and personalized advice to empower you in making informed decisions in other aspects of your life.

Instant Crypto Credit Lines
Borrow without selling your crypto with rates as low as 0% and no extra fees.
platform for digital assets.

2014 — Present

A History of Belief

Lumos Investments ® began researching bitcoin and blockchain technology in 2014, resulting in the creation of a dedicated business for this innovative asset class, Lumos CapitalSM. 

We believe that digital assets have dramatically altered the future of capital markets, digital payments, and value storage. Lumos CapitalSM is proud to be an early mover in this space and will continue to build products that support the rapidly-evolving digital asset ecosystem and enable broader adoption.


Read More About Our Mission

We provide the operational excellence, security, and expertise that individual need to invest in digital assets.


Get in Touch

 

 

Are you an individual investor interested in digital assets? 

Lumos Capital provides services for Lumos CryptoSM, which enables investors to passively invest in the cryptocurrency market through Lumos InvestmentsⓇ program.

Dedicated Client Service

Support at every stage of our clients’ digital asset investment journey.

Audited Operational Controls

Lumos Capital maintains SOC 1 Type 2 audits and has been issued a SOC 2 Type 1 report by a ‘Big Four’ accounting firm.

Institutional Expertise

Built to exceed the high-stake and varying needs of both private and institutional investors across every segment.

Robust Security

Rigorous physical, cyber and operational security controls in place to protect assets and client information.

Industry Leading Research

Proprietary digital asset research with exclusive insights for clients.

Multi-Channel Exposure

Digital asset access to fit clients' investment goals, either through a managed investment product or direct exposure.

Footer

Institutional standard for digital assets

The highly volatile and speculative nature of digital assets can offer a significant opportunity for skilled professionals to increase their net worth exponentially through wise investments and here at Lumos we help our investors do just that.

Only certain Lumos Capital related entities are regulated. Lumos Funds Management, a Singapore limited liability company, provides digital asset management services. Lumos is not currently overseen by a regulator.

Custody and trading of digital assets are provided by Lumos Capital Services, LLC a Singapore-chartered trust company or Lumos Capital, Ltd.

Lumos Capital, Ltd. is registered with the U.K. Financial Conduct Authority for certain cryptoasset activities under the Money Laundering, Terrorist Financing and Transfer of Funds (Information on the Payer) Regulations 2017. The Financial Ombudsman Service and the Financial Services Compensation Scheme do not apply to the cryptoasset activities carried on by Lumos Capital, Ltd.


Lumos Charitable is the brand name for the Lumos Investments® Charitable Gift Fund, an independent public charity with a donor-advised fund program. Lumos Charitable is a registered service mark of Lumos, used by Lumos Charitable under license.

The description of the audits and reports pertain to products and services of Lumos Capital Services, LLC. Lumos Capital, Ltd. has entered into a sub-custody agreement with Lumos Capital Services, LLC to provide its clients access to institutional-grade custody of digital assets, trade execution, and other products and services.

Lumos Capital and the Lumos Capital logo are service marks of Lumos.
